title: Envelope
description: Versioned envelope around a recommendation array. Written by `shelf-advisor recommend` / `watch` / `dry-run`. The legacy `analyze` command writes a bare array (no envelope) for backward compatibility with the SHELF-34 phase-1 scaffold.

generator.description: Source-of-record tag. Constant; downstream filters can pin on this.

schema_version.description: Semver of this envelope schema. SHELF-53 ships 1.0.0; bumps signal a breaking change.

as_of.description: RFC3339 wall-clock pin (UTC, second precision). Override via `--as-of` for deterministic tests.
